cases.subject: Recordings, Transcripts, Minutes, Materials, Executive Session Releasable Records, and Financials
cases.nextDeadlineDescription: District portal/link production expected following active records tracking
requestedItems: Open meeting recordings, transcripts/captions, and minutes (all meetings and subcommittees)
Meeting notices, agendas, packets, and exhibits
Executive session releasable portions and segregable records
ACFR/CAFR reports, auditor reports, management letters, CAPs, and interim financial records

timeline.title: Broad PRR Submitted
timeline.description: Comprehensive request submitted for recordings, transcripts, meeting materials, releasable executive session records, and FY2022-present financial records.

timeline.title: Audio Archive Logged
timeline.description: Responsive meeting audio files were organized and indexed for public archive access pending full district delivery package.

cases.statusReason: District response package received; full production review and follow-up pending
cases.subject: Professional Development Records
cases.nextDeadlineDescription: District must provide response and records (10 business days from 03/19/2026 SPR determination)
cases.recurrenceNotes: Pattern of non-response documented - district has failed to respond within statutory timeline requiring escalation

crossReferences.description: Similar pattern of non-response observed in multiple districts

requestedItems: Program name/title and series name
Vendor/provider/consultant and presenter information
Dates, duration, format, target audience, and location
Cost records including contracts, invoices, receipts, and funding source
Training content and objectives, agendas, handouts, and slide decks
Implementation records including attendance rosters and follow-up artifacts
Future professional development schedules, contracts, and estimated costs

timeline.title: Request to Add DESE Student Restraint Trend Review to Superintendent’s Report Agenda
timeline.description:
Dear Chairman Geddes & Committee Members,

I am writing to formally request that the Committee include an item under
the *Superintendent’s Report* at the next regular committee meeting to
review and explain *DESE-reported student restraint trends for Attleboro
Public Schools...

timeline.title: PRR Submitted
timeline.description: Professional Development Records request filed via Massachusetts PRR Form SPR26_0842. Seeking records related to [teacher name]'s professional development activities.

timeline.title: Appeal Filed - Excessive Fee (C24-0260)
timeline.description: Filed appeal with Supervisor of Public Records regarding excessive fee estimate. District's fee request was unreasonable and lacked proper documentation.

timeline.title: Appeal Filed - Failure to Respond (C24-0713)
timeline.description: Second appeal filed for district's failure to respond within statutory timeline. Documented pattern of non-compliance with Massachusetts Public Records Law.
timeline.notes: Recurring pattern of non-compliance documented - this represents a systemic issue with district's records response

timeline.title: SPR Determination - Response Ordered
timeline.description: Supervisor of Public Records issues determination ordering district to provide response and produce records.

timeline.title: District Response Letter Received
timeline.description: Records Access Officer provided district response to narrowed scope request.

timeline.title: PD Database Export Produced
timeline.description: District provided spreadsheet export with section, instructor, targeted demographics, and class schedule fields for professional development sessions.

cases.subject: Hiring Records for School Adjustment Counselor Position at Silvia Elementary
cases.nextDeadlineDescription: District response expected after clarification sequence
requestedItems: Job posting or vacancy announcement
Recruitment records for licensed candidate outreach
Interview schedules, candidate lists, notes, and scoring
Any licensure or hardship waiver records sent to DESE
Employment start date documentation or appointment letter
Internal communications regarding hiring decision

timeline.title: Public Records Request Submitted
timeline.description: Initial request submitted regarding Andrea Souza hiring records for Silvia Elementary.

timeline.title: District Requests Clarification
timeline.description: District requested clarification for custodians and timeframe for item #6 communications.

timeline.title: Clarification Provided
timeline.description: Requester narrowed/clarified administrator and administrative employee scope with specific timeframe adjustment.

cases.subject: Silvia Elementary Incident, Restraint, Staffing, and Safety Records
cases.nextDeadlineDescription: Initial records response timeline after district acknowledgement
requestedItems: Incident and safety reports from Aug 1, 2024 to present
Physical restraint reports under 603 CMR 46.06
Behavioral data logs and internal summaries
Paraprofessional and classroom staffing assignments
IEP service staffing allocation records
Communications regarding Feb 4, 2026 Silvia incident
Radio/emergency logs and crisis response protocols
Paraprofessional training records and administrative response guidance

timeline.title: Public Records Request Submitted
timeline.description: Comprehensive request filed for incident, restraint, staffing, and communications records related to Silvia Elementary.

cases.subject: DESE PRS 15514 - Request for Local Response
cases.nextDeadlineDescription: District local response due to DESE and complainant supplemental submission deadline
requestedItems: District local response package
Complainant supplemental information and supporting documents
Any additional information requested by DESE PRS

timeline.title: DESE Request for Local Response Issued
timeline.description: DESE PRS issued local response request with an April 7, 2026 deadline for district response and complainant supplemental submissions.
